title: Unauthorized $450.00 charge from Acme Supplies
description: Customer disputes a $450.00 charge from Acme Supplies on their last statement. They claim they never authorized this purchase and are requesting an immediate refund.

title: Unable to process recurring payment for premium subscription
description: Customer's credit card on file expired June 2027. Recurring billing for premium tier subscription failed on July 1. Need to contact customer to update payment method.

title: Request invoice copy for Q2 services
description: Customer needs copies of all invoices from April through June 2027 for internal audit. Invoices were sent by email on June 30.

title: Double charge on May 15 bill
description: Customer noticed two identical charges of $125.00 from 'CloudSync Inc.' on May 15 statement. Refund for one charge was processed on June 25.
